_comment: Vendored canonical project mapping for the Infiquetra org. Plugin reads this by default. Override at $INFIQUETRA_SDLC_PATH/config/project-mappings.json (per the resolution order in load_config). Project node IDs and field/option IDs are NOT cached here — they rotate on rename/recreate; fetched live via _resolve_project_field and discover_project_field_options.
_provenance: Verified 2026-06-20: `gh project list --owner infiquetra` shows the active boards CAMPPS #4, Jeff Intent #3, and Asgard #2. Mount Olympus (former project #1) was retired 2026-06-17 and is closed externally; it is preserved only as historical context in sdlc-schema.json and is NOT an active routing target. No board is a default: board commands require an explicit --project (KTD17). The `repositories` lists are intentionally empty — repo-based default routing was removed so work is never silently routed to a board. Project #3 'Jeff Intent' was renamed to 'Operations' on 2026-06-27.

operations.name: Operations
operations._id_note: Project node id captured 2026-05-29. If it rotates, re-fetch via: gh project view 3 --owner infiquetra --format json -q .id

asgard.name: Asgard
asgard._id_note: Project node id captured 2026-05-29. If it rotates, re-fetch via: gh project view 2 --owner infiquetra --format json -q .id

campps.name: CAMPPS
campps._id_note: Project node id captured 2026-06-20. If it rotates, re-fetch via: gh project view 4 --owner infiquetra --format json -q .id
